user.title: Connect to your Axis door controller
user.description: Enter the controller's address and an administrator account. Lock actions require an Admin user.

discovery_confirm.title: Add Axis door controller
discovery_confirm.description: Enter administrator credentials for the controller discovered at {host}.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the controller.

init.title: Axis door controller options
init.description: Access codes (PINs/cards) are shared across the whole controller cluster. Enable management on just one controller to expose the code-management actions there.

data.manage_codes: Manage access codes from this controller
data.manage_allow_non_admin: Allow non-admins to manage codes (e.g. property managers; use the dashboard card's visibility to limit who sees it)

add_pin.name: Add PIN
add_pin.description: Creates a cardholder and a PIN credential on the cluster, optionally granting one or more access profiles. PINs are stored as plain digits on the controller.

config_entry_id.name: Controller
config_entry_id.description: Controller to route the request through (any controller reaches the shared cluster database).

name.name: Cardholder name
name.description: Display name for the new cardholder, e.g. "Doe, Jane".

pin.name: PIN
pin.description: The PIN digits for this credential.

access_profile_tokens.name: Access profiles
access_profile_tokens.description: Tokens of the access profiles this PIN should be granted. Leave empty to create a code that opens nothing yet. Use 'List access profiles' to find tokens.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether the credential is active immediately.

add_credential.name: Add credential
add_credential.description: Creates a cardholder and a credential (PIN or card) on the cluster, optionally granting access profiles.

config_entry_id.name: Controller
config_entry_id.description: Controller to route the request through (any controller reaches the shared cluster database).

name.name: Cardholder name
name.description: Display name for the new cardholder, e.g. "Doe, Jane".

kind.name: Credential type
kind.description: Whether this is a PIN or a card credential.

code.name: Code
code.description: The PIN digits or the card number, depending on the credential type.

access_profile_tokens.name: Access profiles
access_profile_tokens.description: Tokens of the access profiles this credential should grant. Leave empty for none. Use 'List access profiles' to find tokens.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether the credential is active immediately.

valid_from.name: Start date
valid_from.description: Optional date the credential becomes valid (date only). Empty = valid immediately.

valid_to.name: End date
valid_to.description: Optional last day the credential is valid (date only, inclusive). The controller denies it afterwards; empty = no expiry.

expire_action.name: When expired
expire_action.description: What the daily reaper does after the end date: disable (keeps the code reserved so it isn't re-issued) or delete the credential.

generate_code.name: Generate code
generate_code.description: Generates a random, unique numeric code for a credential type. Length defaults to the convention used by existing codes (5 digits at this site).

config_entry_id.name: Controller
config_entry_id.description: Controller to route the request through.

kind.name: Credential type
kind.description: Whether to size the code as a PIN or a card number.

length.name: Length
length.description: Optional digit count. Defaults to the most common length among existing codes.

remove_credential.name: Remove credential
remove_credential.description: Deletes a credential (PIN/card) from the cluster by its token.

config_entry_id.name: Controller
config_entry_id.description: Controller to route the request through.

credential_token.name: Credential token
credential_token.description: Token of the credential to remove.

set_credential_enabled.name: Enable or disable credential
set_credential_enabled.description: Enables or disables an existing credential without deleting it.

config_entry_id.name: Controller
config_entry_id.description: Controller to route the request through.

credential_token.name: Credential token
credential_token.description: Token of the credential to change.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: Set to on to enable, off to disable.

list_credentials.name: List credentials
list_credentials.description: Returns the cluster's credentials: cardholder name, kind (PIN/card), enabled state and granted profiles. Codes are included only when 'Include code values' is on.

config_entry_id.name: Controller
config_entry_id.description: Controller to route the request through.

include_pins.name: Include code values
include_pins.description: Include the plain-text PIN and card number of each credential in the response. Handle with care.

list_access_profiles.name: List access profiles
list_access_profiles.description: Returns the cluster's access profiles, their tokens and the doors each grants, for use with 'Add PIN' and 'Set credential access profiles'.

config_entry_id.name: Controller
config_entry_id.description: Controller to route the request through.

list_users.name: List cardholders
list_users.description: Returns the cluster's cardholders (users) and their tokens.

config_entry_id.name: Controller
config_entry_id.description: Controller to route the request through.

list_doors.name: List doors
list_doors.description: Returns the cluster's doors and their tokens.

config_entry_id.name: Controller
config_entry_id.description: Controller to route the request through.

list_schedules.name: List schedules
list_schedules.description: Returns the cluster's schedules (e.g. Always, Office hours) and their tokens.

config_entry_id.name: Controller
config_entry_id.description: Controller to route the request through.

ensure_door_profile.name: Ensure door access profile
ensure_door_profile.description: Finds or creates a one-door access profile granting a single door on a schedule (default Always / 24-7), so a credential can be granted an individual door. Returns the profile token.

config_entry_id.name: Controller
config_entry_id.description: Controller to route the request through.

door_token.name: Door
door_token.description: Token of the door to grant. Use 'List doors' to find it.

schedule_token.name: Schedule
schedule_token.description: Token of the schedule (default 'standard_always' = 24/7). Use 'List schedules' to find others.

set_user.name: Set cardholder
set_user.description: Renames or updates a cardholder (e.g. to label a previously blank one).

config_entry_id.name: Controller
config_entry_id.description: Controller to route the request through.

user_token.name: Cardholder token
user_token.description: Token of the cardholder to update. Use 'List credentials' or 'List cardholders' to find it.

remove_user.name: Remove cardholder
remove_user.description: Deletes a cardholder (user) from the cluster by its token. Remove the cardholder's credentials first.

config_entry_id.name: Controller
config_entry_id.description: Controller to route the request through.

user_token.name: Cardholder token
user_token.description: Token of the cardholder to remove.

set_credential_access_profiles.name: Set credential access profiles
set_credential_access_profiles.description: Replaces which access profiles (doors) an existing credential grants, preserving its holder and code.

config_entry_id.name: Controller
config_entry_id.description: Controller to route the request through.

credential_token.name: Credential token
credential_token.description: Token of the credential to change.

access_profile_tokens.name: Access profiles
access_profile_tokens.description: Tokens of the access profiles the credential should grant. Use 'List access profiles' to find tokens.

set_credential_code.name: Set credential code
set_credential_code.description: Changes an existing credential's PIN or card number, preserving its holder, access profiles and enabled state.

config_entry_id.name: Controller
config_entry_id.description: Controller to route the request through.

credential_token.name: Credential token
credential_token.description: Token of the credential to change.

kind.name: Credential type
kind.description: Whether the new code is a PIN or a card number.

code.name: Code
code.description: The new PIN digits or card number.

set_credential_validity.name: Set credential validity
set_credential_validity.description: Sets or clears a credential's start/end dates (the controller enforces the window itself, date only) and what happens once it expires.

config_entry_id.name: Controller
config_entry_id.description: Controller to route the request through.

credential_token.name: Credential token
credential_token.description: Token of the credential to change.

valid_from.name: Start date
valid_from.description: Optional date the credential becomes valid (date only). Empty = valid immediately.

valid_to.name: End date
valid_to.description: Optional last day the credential is valid (date only, inclusive). The controller denies it afterwards; empty = no expiry.

expire_action.name: When expired
expire_action.description: What the daily reaper does after the end date: disable (keeps the code reserved so it isn't re-issued) or delete the credential.
